nodes.name: Toxorhamphus
nodes.summary: Toxorhamphus（Toxorhamphus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如Slaty-headed longbill、Yellow-bellied longbill。

nodes.name: Slaty-headed longbill
nodes.summary: Slaty-headed longbill（Toxorhamphus poliopterus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Slaty-headed longbill。

nodes.name: Slaty-headed longbill
nodes.summary: The slaty-headed longbill or grey-winged longbill (Toxorhamphus poliopterus) is a species of bird in the family Melanocharitidae. It is found in the New Guinea Highlands. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. References
